infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IronSight uses your location to track truck GPS routes during shifts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: IronSight needs background location to continue GPS tracking when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IronSight uses your camera to attach photos to inspections and maintenance records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: IronSight needs access to your photos to attach existing images to inspections.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: IronSight needs background location to continue GPS tracking when the app is in the background.

plugins.cameraPermission: IronSight uses your camera to attach photos to inspections and maintenance records.
